title: Police powers
summary: 9084 — stop and search, arrest, detention, and PACE 1984 safeguards.
learningObjectives: Outline stop and search powers under PACE.
Explain grounds and procedure for arrest.
Describe detention, interview, and rights of suspects.
Evaluate balance between liberty and investigation.

simpleExplanation.title: Police powers and limits
simpleExplanation.summary: PACE 1984 regulates stop and search, arrest, and detention — suspects have rights to legal advice and fair treatment in custody.
steps: Stop and search — s1 PACE, reasonable grounds.

sections.content: **Police powers** (1.2.4) — cite **PACE sections** and **Codes of Practice**.
